name: Lifetime Achievement
description: Recognizes a career of exceptional contribution to the field of research software engineering and to the US-RSE community.

name: USRSE Pioneer
description: Honors a community member whose early advocacy or organizing work made the US-RSE association possible.

name: Excellence in Service
description: Annual recognition of sustained, generous service to US-RSE community programs and operations.

name: Mentor of the Year
description: Awarded to a mentor whose guidance materially advanced one or more mentees' careers in research software.

name: Rising Star
description: Recognizes early-career RSEs whose impact on the community has already been outsized relative to their tenure.

name: Community Builder
description: For members who have built or sustained working groups, affinity groups, or community calls that the rest of US-RSE relies on.

name: Best Conference Talk
description: Best oral presentation at the annual US-RSE conference, as judged by the program committee.

name: Best Conference Poster
description: Best poster at the annual US-RSE conference, as judged by attendee vote and the program committee.
